notes: Solid Galaga clone with working formation, diving, tractor beam, dual-mode, and bonus stages, but enemy formation layout is irregular (boss row only 4 wide, staggered offsets look off), sprites are abstract shapes rather than authentic Galaga pixel art, and the captured-ship rescue mechanic has some edge-case logic issues.

This is a competent Galaga-inspired shooter with working movement, firing, waves, diving enemies, pause and scoring, but several mechanics are simplified or inaccurate to Galaga and the capture/dual-ship flow appears incomplete and potentially inconsistent.
